creator: roam@orbitel.bg
text:
On Thu, Feb 22, 2001 at 12:30:06AM +0100, tobez@tobez.org wrote:
> 
> >Number:         25269
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       New port: mail/libesmtp (libESMTP - A Library for Posting Electronic Mail)
> >Arrival-Date:   Wed Feb 21 15:40:00 PST 2001
> >Originator:     Anton Berezin
> >Description:
> 
> libESMTP is a library to manage posting (or submission of) electronic
> mail using SMTP to a preconfigured Mail Transport Agent (MTA) such as
> Exim. It may be used as part of a Mail User Agent (MUA) or another
> program that must be able to post electronic mail but where mail
> functionality is not the program's primary purpose. libESMTP is not
> intended to be used as part of a program that implements a Mail
> Transport Agent.

What do you think about the attached patch?  It addresses several issues:
- NOPORTDOCS handling was added to bsd.port.mk, the patch changes pkg-plist
  to use %%PORTDOCS%% instead of %%DOC%%;
- there's no need to install examples file-by-file, /usr/bin/install can
  handle examples/* just fine;
- on both -stable and -current boxes, another include was needed, the patch
  adds it to files/patch-headers.  I wonder if this should not be split
  into two patchfiles, though..

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
This sentence was in the past tense.

diff -urN libesmtp-orig/Makefile libesmtp/Makefile
--- libesmtp-orig/Makefile	Sat Mar  3 19:40:09 2001
+++ libesmtp/Makefile	Sat Mar  3 19:37:44 2001
@@ -19,13 +19,7 @@
 post-install:
 .ifndef(NOPORTDOCS)
 	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/examples/libesmtp
-.for i in examples/Makefile examples/mail-file.c examples/test-mail
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${i} ${PREFIX}/share/examples/libesmtp
-.endfor
-
-PLIST_SUB+=	DOC=''
-.else
-PLIST_SUB+=	DOC='@comment '
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/examples/* ${PREFIX}/share/examples/libesmtp
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
diff -urN libesmtp-orig/files/patch-headers.c libesmtp/files/patch-headers.c
--- libesmtp-orig/files/patch-headers.c	Sat Mar  3 19:40:09 2001
+++ libesmtp/files/patch-headers.c	Sat Mar  3 19:36:11 2001
@@ -8,3 +8,14 @@
  
  #include "libesmtp-private.h"
  #include "headers.h"
+--- smtp-api.c.orig	Sat Mar  3 19:35:02 2001
++++ smtp-api.c	Sat Mar  3 19:35:11 2001
+@@ -20,6 +20,8 @@
+  *  Foundation, Inc., 59 Temple Place, Suite 330, Boston, MA  02111-1307  USA
+  */
+ 
++#include <sys/types.h>
++
+ #include <stdarg.h>
+ #include <string.h>
+ #include <stdlib.h>
diff -urN libesmtp-orig/pkg-plist libesmtp/pkg-plist
--- libesmtp-orig/pkg-plist	Sat Mar  3 19:40:09 2001
+++ libesmtp/pkg-plist	Sat Mar  3 19:37:55 2001
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 lib/libesmtp.so.1
 lib/libesmtp.so
 lib/libesmtp.a
-%%DOC%%share/examples/libesmtp/Makefile
-%%DOC%%share/examples/libesmtp/mail-file.c
-%%DOC%%share/examples/libesmtp/test-mail
-%%DOC%%@dirrm share/examples/libesmtp
+%%PORTDOCS%%share/examples/libesmtp/Makefile
+%%PORTDOCS%%share/examples/libesmtp/mail-file.c
+%%PORTDOCS%%share/examples/libesmtp/test-mail
+%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm share/examples/libesmtp
